debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

proof:
rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with h | h
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h
  · convert offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h using 1
    ext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j]
failed_attempts:
haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [WignerMeasure, HasLaw]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | h_eq | h_gt
  · have h_eq_proj : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩) := by
      ext ω; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt, ne_of_lt h_lt]
    rw [h_eq_proj, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; simp [ne_of_lt h_lt]
  · contradiction
  · have h_eq_proj : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩) := by
      ext ω; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt, ne_of_gt h_gt, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    rw [h_eq_proj, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; simp [ne_of_lt h_gt]

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with
  | inl h_lt => exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_lt
  | inr h_gt =>
    convert offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_gt using 2
    ext ω
    exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j

have I : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · let p : Index n := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩
    have : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω p) := by
      ext ω; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt, ne_of_lt h_lt]
    rw [this, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, @Measure.map_eval_pi _ _ _ _ I p]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; simp [ne_of_lt h_lt]
  · contradiction
  · let p : Index n := ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩
    have : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω p) := by
      ext ω; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt, ne_of_gt h_gt, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
      split_ifs; exact rfl; contradiction; contradiction
    rw [this, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, @Measure.map_eval_pi _ _ _ _ I p]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; simp [ne_of_lt h_gt]

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    rw [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
  simp only [Matrix.of_apply]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · rw [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    simp [h_lt, h_lt.ne]
    rw [Measure.map_eval, wignerMeasureDist]
    simp [h_lt.ne]
  · contradiction
  · rw [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    simp [h, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    rw [Measure.map_eval, wignerMeasureDist]
    simp [h_gt.ne]

have : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [HasLaw, WignerMeasure]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩ := by
      ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt]
    rw [this, Measure.map_eval, wignerMeasureDist]
    simp [ne_of_lt h_lt]
  · contradiction
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩ := by
      ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt, h, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    rw [this, Measure.map_eval, wignerMeasureDist]
    simp [ne_of_gt h_gt]

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [HasLaw]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩ := by
      ext ω
      simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      split_ifs with h_eq' h_lt'
      · contradiction
      · rfl
      · contradiction
    rw [h_eq, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist
    rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_lt)]
  · contradiction
  · have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩ := by
      ext ω
      simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      split_ifs with h_eq' h_lt'
      · contradiction
      · exact absurd h_lt' (not_lt_of_gt h_gt)
      · congr
    rw [h_eq, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    unfold wignerMeasureDist
    rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_gt)]

haveI (k : Index n) : IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n k) := by
    rw [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with h_lt | h_gt
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩ := by
      ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt, ne_of_lt h_lt]
    rw [this, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h_lt]
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩ := by
      ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt, ne_of_gt h_gt, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    rw [this, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h_gt]

rw [WignerMeasure]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt, h_lt.ne]
    convert Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h_lt.ne]
  · contradiction
  · simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt.ne', not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    convert Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h_gt.ne]

let p : Index n := ⟨(min i j, max i j), min_le_max i j⟩
  have h_proj : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω p := by
    ext ω
    simp only [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Matrix.of_apply]
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · exact (h h_eq).elim
    · congr; simp [p, min_eq_left_of_lt h_lt, max_eq_right_of_lt h_lt]
    · congr
      have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h.symm
      simp [p, min_eq_right_of_lt h_gt, max_eq_left_of_lt h_gt]
  rw [h_proj, WignerMeasure]
  haveI : ∀ x, IsSigmaFinite (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n x) := by
    intro x; unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [Measure.map_eval]
  unfold wignerMeasureDist
  simp only [p, min_eq_max_iff]
  split_ifs with h_eq
  · exact (h h_eq).elim
  · rfl

rw [WignerMeasure]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩ := by
      ext ω
      simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_lt, ne_of_lt h_lt]
    rw [this, HasLaw, Measure.map_eval]
    · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h_lt]
    · infer_instance
  · contradiction
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩ := by
      ext ω
      simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_gt, ne_of_gt h_gt, not_lt_of_gt h_gt]
    rw [this, HasLaw, Measure.map_eval]
    · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h_gt]
    · infer_instance

rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with h_lt | h_gt
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_lt
  · have eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i := by
      ext; apply wignerMatrixSymmetric
    rw [eq]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' n h_gt

rw [HasLaw]
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · contradiction
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩ := by

    · simp [wignerMeasureDist, h]
    · infer_instance
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩ := by
      ext ω
      simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      rw [if_neg h, if_neg (not_lt_of_gt h_gt)]
      rfl
    rw [this, Measure.map_eval_pi]
    · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h_gt]
    · infer_instance

haveI : ∀ q, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n q) := fun q ↦ by

  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt

rw [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
  · rw [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg h, dif_pos h_lt]

  · contradiction

rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', Matrix.of_apply, wignerMatrixEntryFunction]

  · contradiction

  · convert Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) _
    rw [wignerMeasureDist]; simp [h.ne.symm]

unfold wignerMatrixMap wignerMatrixMap' wignerMatrixEntryFunction
  split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
  · contradiction
  · rw [HasLaw, Measure.map_eval]
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h]
  · rw [HasLaw, Measure.map_eval]
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h.symm]

have h_proj : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) =
      (fun (ω : Index n → ℝ) ↦ ω ⟨(min i j, max i j), min_le_max i j⟩) := by
    ext ω

    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · exact (h h_eq).elim

  letI : ∀ p, IsFiniteMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> exact IsProbabilityMeasure.toIsFiniteMeasure
  rw [Measure.map_eval_pi]
  unfold wignerMeasureDist
  split_ifs with h_iso
  · have : min i j = max i j := h_iso
    rw [min_eq_max_iff] at this
    contradiction
  · rfl
